blocking_reasons: Fully rasterized compact scans are now recoverable, but the scan class is still under-validated and slower than text-backed packets.
Broad launch remains blocked until non-spine and deeper OCR coverage are validated.

dimensions.decision: Validated compact text-backed hospital packets are ready for narrow-pilot use.
Sparse packets no longer render a junky or empty-feeling Page 1 when anchors are absent.

evidence.open_issue: Fully rasterized compact MIMIC pages still hit live Tesseract timeouts on 4/5 pages and collapse to zero events; synthetic image-only and noisy corpus OCR paths complete.

dimensions.decision: OCR is proven on some degraded packets but not yet across the full scan class.
Fully rasterized compact scans are now recoverable, but the scan class is still under-validated and slower than text-backed packets.
Richer spine packets preserve more chronology structure and better encounter semantics on the validated slice.

missing_buckets: broad rasterized/OCR corpus beyond the current 3-packet sweep

dimensions.decision: Broad launch remains blocked until non-spine and deeper OCR coverage are validated.
